creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This port provides a British English voice, sampled at 8 kHz, for
Festival. It depends on the festival (ports/21182), festlex-poslex
(ports/21186) and festlex-oald (ports/21185) ports.  It conflicts with
festvox-rab16 (ports/21199).  This is based on the NetBSD port.  Please
retain the line saying so, and the $NetBSD$ RCS tags, when committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festvox-rab8.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
